mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_feature_event WHERE fg_active = '1' AND LOWER(event_status) = 'success'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log WHERE fg_active = '1'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id_doctor) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log WHERE fg_active = '1'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log WHERE fg_active = '1' AND status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log WHERE fg_active = '1' AND status IN ('completed', 'abandoned')

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log WHERE fg_active = '1' AND status IN ('completed', 'abandoned')
AND CAST(CAST(change_summary_json AS jsonb) ->> 'diagnosisChanges' AS integer) = 0
AND JSON_VALUE(change_summary_json, '$.diagnosisChanges' RETURNING NUMBER) = 0

SELECT
TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_str, DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time) AS day_order,
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(event_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_str, TRUNC(event_time) AS day_order,
COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM c_ai_feature_event WHERE fg_active = '1' AND LOWER(event_status) = 'success'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time)
GROUP BY TRUNC(event_time) ORDER BY TRUNC(event_time)

SELECT
TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', consultation_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_str, DATE_TRUNC('day', consultation_time) AS day_order,
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(consultation_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day_str, TRUNC(consultation_time) AS day_order,
COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM c_ai_user_consultation_log WHERE fg_active = '1'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', consultation_time) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('day', consultation_time)
GROUP BY TRUNC(consultation_time) ORDER BY TRUNC(consultation_time)

SELECT r.na_region AS name, SUM(COALESCE(l.cnt, 0)) AS value FROM c_ai_region r LEFT JOIN c_ai_org o ON o.id_region = r.id_region AND o.fg_active = '1' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT id_org, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM c_ai_feature_event WHERE fg_active = '1' AND LOWER(event_status) = 'success'
GROUP BY id_org ) l ON o.id_org = l.id_org WHERE r.fg_active = '1'
AND r.id_region = #{query.idRegion}
GROUP BY r.na_region ORDER BY value DESC

choose.when: SELECT module_name FROM ( VALUES ('语音问诊'), ('智能问诊'), ('报告单解读'), ('聊天'), ('AI诊断鉴别'), ('AI推荐诊断'), ('AI推荐用药'), ('AI推荐检查'), ('AI推荐检验'), ('AI推荐处置'), ('知识库使用') ) modules(module_name)
choose.otherwise: SELECT '语音问诊' AS module_name FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '智能问诊' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '报告单解读' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '聊天' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'AI诊断鉴别' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'AI推荐诊断' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'AI推荐用药' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'AI推荐检查' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'AI推荐检验' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'AI推荐处置' FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '知识库使用' FROM dual

mapper.sql:
SELECT feature_name AS "moduleName", COUNT(1) AS "callCount", COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(id_doctor), ''), id_device)) AS "doctorCount", COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(1) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(id_doctor), ''), id_device)), 0)), 0) AS "avgPerDoctor" FROM c_ai_feature_event WHERE fg_active = '1' AND LOWER(event_status) = 'success'
GROUP BY feature_name ORDER BY "callCount" DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT
TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dayStr, DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time) AS dayOrder,
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(event_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dayStr, TRUNC(event_time) AS dayOrder,
feature_name AS moduleName, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM c_ai_feature_event WHERE fg_active = '1' AND LOWER(event_status) = 'success'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time), feature_name ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('day', event_time), feature_name
GROUP BY TRUNC(event_time), feature_name ORDER BY TRUNC(event_time), feature_name
